get.description: Retrieves a list of photo URLs for the event. Only accessible to confirmed guests or organizers. Pending/declined guests get 403 Forbidden.

post.description: Uploads up to 10 photos as multipart/form-data for the given event. Only guests or organizers can upload. Max file size is 10MB per photo.

207.description: Multi-Status: Some photos failed to upload

400.description: Bad request or max 10 photos exceeded

get.description: Retrieves the wishlist items for the event. Guests see masked details (booked by others is hidden), organizers see everything.

post.description: Validates guest's text against the anti-wishlist using AI. Returns whether allowed or blocked, along with the reasoning.
Uses AI to parse freeform text into wishlist and anti-wishlist items. Generates a new wishlist for the event. Only organizers can call this.
Allows a guest to book an entire item so others cannot fund or book it. Returns HTTP 409 Conflict if already booked.

409.description: Item already booked or has funds

post.description: Allows a guest to crowdsource funds for an item. Returns HTTP 409 if the item is already fully booked.

post.summary: Complete mobile auth flow through MAX initData
Exchange completed MAX auth session for backend JWT
Start mobile auth flow through MAX mini app

parameters.description: Filter by approval status (pending, approved, rejected)
parameters.name: approval_status
